tasks.subject: Update link script to install extensions automatically
tasks.description: Modify link-into-pi-agent.sh so running it also installs local extensions from agent/extensions (when available), with safe behavior when pi CLI is missing or install fails. Keep existing symlink behavior intact.

tasks.subject: Validate link script changes
tasks.description: Run shell syntax check and execute the script to ensure symlinking still works and extension auto-install path behaves as expected without breaking existing flows.

tasks.subject: Commit repository changes
tasks.description: Stage and commit the script fix along with all other current repo changes, using a clear commit message and body that describe the scope.
